series_metadata.series_description: Claimant information file used for determining eligibility for unemployment compensationbenefits. It contains personal information on claimant & claimant''s work history. This unemployment compensation filecontains confidential information and documentation regarding initial, continued, and additional claims forunemployment benefits.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents 60 days afterprepped, imaged, indexed , and qualitycontrol performed and completed, thendestroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 1 benefit year,records center 4 years, then destroyprovided no administrative or legal action ispending., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
